name: remotion-storyboard
description: Turn video ideas into precise Remotion or HyperFrames storyboards and implementation-ready scene plans.

interface.shortDescription: Generate Apple-grade storyboards for Remotion or HyperFrames.
interface.longDescription: Converts rough video concepts into structured runtime-specific scene scripts with pacing, transitions, and implementation guidance for Remotion or HyperFrames.
defaultPrompt: Turn this product promo concept into a 45-second Remotion storyboard.
Turn this launch concept into a deterministic HyperFrames composition plan with HTML structure, timing attributes, and render workflow.
